issue: 401 Unauthorized errors blocking dashboard quick-info widgets (weather, history)

root_cause.primary: Session cookie configuration was using production settings (secure: true, domain: redsquatch.com) even in development/mixed environments
root_cause.detail: When NODE_ENV=production, the code always set secure: true and domain: 'redsquatch.com', causing cookies to be rejected by browsers when running on localhost or over HTTP. This prevented session persistence and caused all requireAuth endpoints to return 401.

diagnosis.middleware_stack: CORRECT - session middleware properly registered before route handlers
diagnosis.frontend_credentials: CORRECT - all quick-info fetch calls include credentials: 'include'
diagnosis.cors_configuration: CORRECT - CORS allows credentials with appropriate origins

changes: Fixed HTTPS detection to properly trust X-Forwarded-Proto from proxies
Added localhost detection to avoid domain cookie issues in development
Set secure: false for localhost/HTTP requests
Set sameSite: 'lax' for HTTP/localhost, 'none' for HTTPS production
Set domain: undefined for localhost (session-only), 'redsquatch.com' for production

step_1_authentication.action: curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/client/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"acme_client","password":"123456"}' -c cookies.txt -b cookies.txt
step_1_authentication.expected: 200 OK with 'Login successful' message and Set-Cookie header

step_2_session_persistence.expected: 200 OK with authenticated: true and user data

step_3_protected_endpoints.expected: 200 OK with weather data, NOT 401 Unauthorized

step_4_dashboard_load.expected: Dashboard loads without 401 errors, Quick Info widgets render with weather/history data

next_steps: Restart API container to pick up code changes (docker compose restart redsquatch-api)
Test login flow with curl to verify session is saved
Test dashboard in browser to confirm Quick Info widgets load
Monitor API logs for [COOKIE-CONFIG] and [AUTH] messages to verify session handling
If 401 errors persist, check PostgreSQL connection and session table creation
